summary: Backend API testing completed for P0-P2 features. 19/19 tests passed (100%). All requested features verified working: Job Management with pay_rate, Recognition CRUD, User sorting, CSV templates, Setup Stats, Events CRUD.

job_management_pay_rate.details: Jobs can be created, updated, and deleted with pay_rate field. AdminJobsScreen.js correctly uses pay_rate (not hourly_rate).

admin_dashboard_no_super_admin.details: No references to Tenant Management, isSuperAdmin, or superAdminMenuItems found. Dashboard shows only admin-appropriate items.

recognition_screen.details: Recognition screen has detail modal and create modal. Can view existing recognitions and create new ones.

user_management_sorting.details: Users are sorted with pending_setup users at the top using sort function.

csv_export_utf8.details: Export uses encoding: 'utf8' string instead of EncodingType.UTF8 constant.

setup_stats_clickable.details: Stat boxes use TouchableOpacity with onPress handlers to navigate to AdminUsers or show pending modal.

events_date_time_pickers.details: Date and time pickers implemented as modal selectors (showDatePicker, showTimePicker, showRsvpDatePicker states).

student_reports_export.details: Export button present with handleExportCSV function using exportAsCSV utility.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ AdminDashboardScreen.js has no super admin specific items (no Tenant Management)
✓ AdminRecognitionScreen.js has full CRUD with detail and create modals
✓ AdminUsersScreen.js sorts pending users to top (lines 309-314)
✓ AdminSetupStatsScreen.js stat boxes are TouchableOpacity with navigation
seed_data_creation: Test jobs and events created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0-P2 features verified working via backend API tests. This is a React Native Expo mobile app - frontend testing limited to code review. Key endpoints: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/jobs (with pay_rate), GET/POST /api/shoutouts, GET /api/admin/users/search, GET /api/admin/csv-templates, GET /api/admin/setup-stats, POST/PUT /api/events.
note: This is a React Native Expo mobile app. Frontend testing was done via code review since Playwright cannot test mobile apps. All backend APIs verified working.
